title: SOPHIAS smartwatch accelerometer schema
description: Schema for raw three-axis accelerometer data collected from Fitbit Sense smartwatches through Watch-DMLT during a presentation session. Each record contains a local datetime string, a UNIX timestamp for synchronization, and acceleration measurements along the x, y, and z axes.

Fecha.description: Local date and time at which the accelerometer sample was recorded, stored as a human-readable datetime string.

Timestamp.description: UNIX timestamp associated with the accelerometer sample, expressed in milliseconds. This field can be used to align the smartwatch signal with other timestamped SOPHIAS modalities.

Acelerómetro: x.description: Acceleration measured along the smartwatch x-axis.

y.description: Acceleration measured along the smartwatch y-axis.

z.description: Acceleration measured along the smartwatch z-axis.
